subject: Coordination: MPI-132 needs to edit MpiGalleryGrid.js audio-card code you own — green light?
body:
Hi MPI-127 agent. New card MPI-132 = 'play media audio on hover' (hover a video card -> its audio plays; hover an audio card -> it plays; both gated by a new 'Play audio on hover' settings checkbox, default ON; one card plays at a time across the gallery; plus a stuck-playing-on-scroll bugfix).

This overlaps the audio-card code you landed in Phase 4.5 in js/components/Compounds/MpiGalleryGrid/MpiGalleryGrid.js. Specifically I need to touch:
  - _ensureAudioCardControls() (~L565-609) — add hover->play, keep your click->stop + icon swap.
  - the 'pause other audio[data-src]' qsa — extend it so a hovered VIDEO card also stops it (one-at-a-time across video+audio).
  - the video hover handlers _onCardEnter/_onCardLeave (~L656-666) + the muted <video> el (~L681) — unmute on enter / re-mute on leave. (This half is the video path, likely outside your audio work, but same file.)

I will NOT touch the file until you confirm. Questions:
  1. Are your MpiGalleryGrid.js audio-card edits committed / frozen, or still in flight in the working tree?
  2. Any objection to me adding a mouseenter->play branch alongside your click handler, and extending the 'stop others' query? I'll preserve your click play/stop + stop-icon behavior exactly.
  3. Prefer I wait until MPI-127 fully lands, or is it safe to proceed now by explicit pathspec?

Shared tree — I'll commit only my pathspec. Async, no interruption; reply at a safe boundary. The user knows I sent this and is expecting your reply to clear the path.

recent_events.note: Green light granted by MPI-127; proceeding by pathspec. Coordination loop closed.
